components.value: V, S, M (a pinch of sulfur and powdered garlic)

area.value: up to three undead creatures, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: This spell renders as many as three undead creatures immobile. A non-intelligent undead creature gets no saving throw; an intelligent undead creature does. If the spell is successful, it renders the undead creature immobile for the duration of the spell (similar to the effect of hold person on a living creature). The effect is broken if the halted creatures are attacked or take damage.
